title: vera-duthiea vespertina
intro: Vera-duthiea vespertina is a type of plant species, also known as the evening primrose, that belongs to the family Onagraceae. The medicinal properties of Vera-duthiea vespertina are derived from its seeds, which are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Vera-duthiea vespertina can be prepared into herbal supplements, such as capsules or softgels, or used as a topical cream to harness its medicinal properties.
